title: aleuritia bellidifolia
intro: Aleuritia bellidifolia is a type of plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae, commonly known as a wild strawberry or strawberry bush. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Aleuritia bellidifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Aleuritia bellidifolia include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally, depending on the desired effect.
